products.title: Bluebell Dress
products.description: Inspired by Clio's childhood summers spent running through the french countryside, our shimmering Bluebell Dress features a dazzling array of ethereal country air motifs on a glittering sky blue beaded base, complete with a romantic teardrop embellished neckline. It is the perfect mini dress for your next garden soirée.

Worn over a white slip dress the Mia piece balances sophistication and drama in equal measure, capturing the magic of old Hollywood for the modern muse.

products.title: Paloma Dress

Designed with a fully functional corset with embroidered rose motif which flows into a captivating draped skirt, the Paloma blends classic couture elements with contemporary allure.

products.title: Naomi Dress
products.description: The Naomi Dress is the showstopper of the collection. This bustier column dress with in-built corset construction and a dramatic train, features a full hand-embellished leopard artwork, with amber eyes, crystal whiskers and crystal claws. The Naomi Dress was designed for red carpets, galas, or any occasion that calls for a statement.

products.title: Moonray Cape
products.description: The Moonray Cape in embroidered tulle captures the magic of moonbeams glittering through a midnight sky. The dramatic floor-length cape features a delicately scalloped detail and intricate embroidery which shimmers upwards from the hem. The cape pairs perfectly with the Sophia and Selene dress in matching rose hues.

products.title: Mimosa Dress
products.description: The Mimosa Dress, in a rich cabernet hue, is adorned with crystal embellishments that cascade down the body, catching the light with every movement. A high neckline and sleek, elongated silhouette create a statuesque effect, balancing timeless sophistication with modernity.

products.title: Eartha Mini Dress
products.description: The Eartha mini dress encapsulates the diva energy of the Hollywood collection in an all over leopard embroidery. Featuring a sleek square neckline, cheeky thigh split, and on our signature stretch mesh which sculpts the body to perfection. It's the ultimate after-dark statement, capturing playful sensuality with modern sophistication in equal measure.

products.title: Armour Bag
products.description: The Armour Bag is for the brave hearted. Inspired by our best selling Quartz collection, the Armour Bag has been reimagined in an ornate metallic chrome masterpiece that sparkles from every angle. Hand embellished by our artisan makers, the Armour bag is the perfect size for all of your party essentials.

products.title: Ariel Mini Dress
products.description: Reimagining our Bridal '25 best-seller in pops of Summer colour, the Ariel Mini is adorned with intricate hand embroidery, delicately placed to create seashell motifs on our classic mini shape. Each bead sparkles in the light like the sunlight on water, and is a refined take on oceanic glamour.

products.title: Marina Shorts
products.description: Introducing the Marina Short in Lemon - a new sunshine essential. These high-waisted, fully-embellished shorts are cut to flatter, featuring delicate coral beading across the front, and a cheeky starfish placement at the back. Bold yet refined, they capture the carefree spirit of Summer with a twist of coastal glamour. Pair with the Marina Top to complete the set.

products.title: Sirena Bag
products.description: Introducing the Sirena Bag. A stunning fusion of artisanal craftsmanship and oceanic beauty, this exquisite bag is adorned with hand-embroidered coral beadwork. The Sirena Bag is a statement piece that exudes understated elegance, making it the perfect accessory to add a touch of coastal charm and intricate detail to any outfit.

products.title: Sirena Bag
products.description: Introducing the Sirena Bag. A stunning fusion of artisanal craftsmanship and oceanic beauty, this exquisite bag is adorned with hand-embroidered coral beadwork. The Sirena Bag is a statement piece that exudes understated elegance, making it the perfect accessory to add a touch of coastal charm and intricate detail to any outfit.

products.title: Scallop Bag
products.description: Introducing the Scallop Bag. A delicate fusion of craftsmanship and elegance, this exquisite handbag is adorned with hand-sewn pearl and crystal beadwork, intricately arranged in shimmering shell motifs. The meticulously placed beads create a sculptural texture that catch the light from every angle. A true statement of understated luxury, the Scallop Bag is the perfect finishing touch.

products.title: Marina Top
products.description: The Marina Top in Pink captures seaside elegance in every detail. Hand-beaded with delicate coral and shell motifs and sculpted with a soft sweetheart neckline, it’s designed to flatter. Pair with the Marina Shorts for the full look. The Pink Marina Set is exclusive to the Clio Peppiatt website.

products.title: Marina Top
products.description: The Marina Top in Lilac captures seaside elegance in every detail. Hand-beaded with delicate coral and shell motifs and sculpted with a soft sweetheart neckline, it’s designed to flatter. Pair with the Marina Skirt for the full look.

products.title: Marina Top
products.description: The Marina Top in Lemon captures seaside elegance in every detail. Hand-beaded with delicate coral and shell motifs and sculpted with a soft sweetheart neckline, it’s designed to flatter. Pair with either the Marina Skirt or Short in Lemon for the full look.

products.title: Marina Skirt
products.description: The Marina Skirt in Lilac is cut in a flattering A-line sihouette. Featuring delicate hand-embellished coral and shell motifs, it brings coastal elegance to any summer setting. Pair with the Marina Top to complete the set.

products.title: Marina Skirt
products.description: The Marina Skirt in Lemon is cut in a flattering A-line silhouette. Featuring delicate hand-embellished coral and shell motifs, it brings coastal elegance to any summer setting. Pair with the Marina Top to complete the set. The Marina Skirt in Lemon is exclusive to the Clio Peppiatt website.

products.title: Marina Shorts
products.description: Introducing the Marina Short in Pink. A perfect blend of coastal joy and craftsmanship, these high-waisted shorts are hand-embroidered with delicate starfish and coral motifs. Designed to flatter with a structured yet effortless fit, they capture the spirit of endless summer days. Pair with the Marina Top to complete the set. The Pink Marina Set is exclusive to the Clio Peppiatt website.

products.title: Calypso Wrap Skirt
products.description: Introducing the Calypso Wrap Skirt, a perfect blend of femininity and effortless style. Adorned with intricate starfish, shells and coral beaded motifs which shimmer delicately, capturing the essence of the sea with every movement. Designed to move with ease, this wrap silhouette captures the spirit of coastal escape. Pair with the Calypso Top for the perfect island-ready ensemble.

products.title: West Coast Mini Dress
products.description: Inspired by the warm glow of a desert sunset, the West Coast Mini dress is tribute to the American West. The dress features a gradient from deep sunset red to soft sandy gold, with dusty blue mountains and blooming cacti - each motif brought to life with breathtaking detail. This is a dress made for golden hours.

products.title: Vegas Mini Dress
products.description: Step into the spotlight in the Vegas Mini Dress, a playful hand-beaded masterpiece that captures the electrifying energy of the city. An unapologetic embrace of glamour, the dress features showgirls, martini glasses, poker dice and playing cards, and iconic neon signs. A love letter to late nights and big entrances.

products.title: Sequinned Mini Dress
products.description: This mini dress shimmers with iridescent sequins that catch the light from every angle. The fluid silhouette skims the body with ease, offering understated elegance, while the hand-beaded fringe at the hem brings a playful, flirtatious finish. A piece that moves effortlessly and is perfect for dancing.

products.title: Rio Mini Dress
products.description: The Rio Mini Dress is a tropical masterpiece. Adorned with jungle illustrations, this is one of the most intricately beaded pieces in the collection - from palm trees and multi-coloured parrots, to a little monkey and leopard. The Rio Dress is a showstopper that will have heads turning from dusk till dawn.

products.title: Rainbow Cora Mini Dress
products.description: The Rainbow Cora Mini is embroidered with delicate florals in a bright rainbow palette. Crafted from a sheer tulle base and cut to a softly sculpted silhouette, this light-catching and flirtatious dress is the ultimate piece for after-dark adventures and sun-drenched escapes. The Rainbow Cora Mini is exclusive to the Clio Peppiatt website.

products.title: Rainbow Cora Dress
products.description: The Rainbow Cora Dress is daringly sheer and rich with colour, with jewel-toned florals that trail across the body. A softly-sculpted silhouette and barely-there feel, it is the ultimate piece for after-dark adventures and sun-drenched escapes.

products.title: Palazzo Mini Dress
products.description: Inspired by the opulence of Venetian palaces, the Palazzo Mini Dress features intricate hand-embellished motifs - renaissance-like cherubs, the iconic winged lion, ornate vases overflowing with florals, and sun & moon symbolism associated with Venetian carnival. The finest details of the dress feel like wearable art, evoking the romance and elegance of Venice.

products.title: Mimosa Dress
products.description: Radiant in sunflower yellow, the Mimosa Dress is a celebration of light, movement and modern glamour. Adorned with cascading hand-sewn sequins, it catches the light from every angle. The high neckline and sleek, elongated silhouette create a statuesque shape.

products.title: Miami Mini Dress
products.description: The Miami Mini Dress channels the playful glamour and fantasy of South Beach. hand-embellished in a blue-pink ombre, the Miami dress features a retro pink Cadillac with 'MIAMI' license plate, bright flamingoes, a dolphin, palm trees and tasseled beach umbrella. This dress is a love letter to Summer escapism.

products.title: Mariposa Dress
products.description: Fully hand-embellished and with a singular butterfly motif, the Mariposa Gown captures a moment of delicate transformation. The silhouette glides with the body, merging softness and precision in a piece made for a modern muse.

products.title: Mariposa Mini Dress
products.description: Introducing the Mariposa Crystal Mini. Designed in our iconic fit and flare silhouette with a delicate sweetheart neckline, this hand beaded dress sparkles iridescently with every movement. Adorned with intricate butterfly motifs, this is the ultimate statement piece for summer nights.

products.title: Marina Mini Dress
products.description: The Marina Mini Dress in Pink is a tribute to the treasures of the sea - encrusted starfish, bright seahorses, and colourful shells glisten across the hand-embellished dress. An iconic Clio Peppiatt shape, cut with a soft sweetheart neckline and flirty thigh split, it balances elegance with escapism.

products.title: Marina Mini Dress
products.description: The Marina Mini Dress in Ivory is a tribute to the treasures of the sea - encrusted starfish, bright seahorses, and colourful shells glisten across the hand-embellished dress. An iconic Clio Peppiatt shape, cut with a soft sweetheart neckline and flirty thigh split, it balances elegance with escapism. The Marina Mini Dress in Ivory is exclusive to the Clio Peppiatt website.

products.title: Marina Mini Dress
products.description: The Marina Mini Dress in Black is a tribute to the treasures of the sea—encrusted starfish, bright seahorses, and colourful shells glisten across the hand-embellished dress. An iconic Clio Peppiatt shape, cut with a soft sweetheart neckline and flirty thigh split, it balances elegance with escapism.

products.title: Island Mini Dress
products.description: The Island Mini dress shimmers with enchanting details - playful mermaids chase fish through the sea, or perch on a rock sipping from a shell, all beneath a star-lit sky. This midnight-hued piece captures the magic of the ocean after dark.

products.title: Tropical Gradient Mini Dress
products.description: Evoking the heat and vibrancy of island shores, the Gradient Mini Dress in Tropical features a bright blend of sun-drenched hues. This is the perfect mini dress for sunsets, and nights that see the sunrise. The Tropical Gradient Mini is exclusive to the Clio Peppiatt website.

products.title: Phoenix Gradient Mini Dress
products.description: With a fiery ombré palette, the Phoenix Gradient Mini embodies passion and transformation. Designed in our signature silhouette, it’s a powerful yet playful statement for after-dark dressing.

products.title: Pastel Gradient Mini Dress
products.description: Softly sculpted in our signature fit-and-flare silhouette, the Gradient Mini Dress in Pastel shimmers with ombré beadwork that evokes a soft late Summer sunset. Feminine and romantic, the pastel gradient is an iconic Clio Peppiatt piece.

products.title: Coralina Mini Dress
products.description: The Coralina Crystal Dress is designed to stand out. It's cut to flatter with a plunging neckline, and trimmed in tonal ostrich feathers that perfectly accentuate your every dance move. This dress is flirty and full of charm, embodying modern femininity, with luminous rose-pink beads and Clio's signature crystal cluster embellishment.

products.title: Capri Mini Dress
products.description: Inspired by the romance of the Amalfi Coast, the Capri Mini Dress is adorned with hand-embellished lemons and oranges, climbing vine leaves, and tiny pearl flowers. A joyful expression of summer’s brightness, this playful silhouette is a true ode to the romance of the Amalfi Coast.

products.title: Capri Dress

The placement of motifs flatter and frames the figure, accuentuating the female form. This showstopping gown is exclusive to the Clio Peppiatt website.

Whether walking down the aisle or dancing beneath the stars, the Tiered Veil brings an air of effortless elegance and will s

products.description: Clio Peppiatt's Crystal Stockings are the perfect flirty and fun accessory to complete any of our bridal looks. A balance between sheer and bejewelled, these stockings will be the cherry on top of the cake on your big day.

products.title: Venus Dress
products.description: The full-length Venus Dress blends timelessness with sleek sophistication. The sleek column shape with a thigh high split is finished with a soft sweet-heart neckline which is adorned with clusters of pearls, adding a touch of romance. Whether you’re wearing the Venus Gown for a wedding or a white party, this subtle glamour will make the boldest statement.

products.title: Twilight Mini Dress
products.description: The Twilight mini dress is a flirty yet refined statement of modern romance - perfect as a bridal second-look or party piece. Carefully placed floral embellishments contour the body, flattering the figure with femininity and intention. Whether worn in the moonlight or the spotlight, this captivating dress will make you feel both effortlessly elegant and empowered.

products.title: Azure Mini Dress
products.description: The Azure is a statement piece, full of sparkle and made for celebration. The soft-blue hand embroidered dress is finished with clusters of crystals, an encrusted silver neckline, and a trim of soft tonal ostrich feathers. Whether worn for a cocktail party or as ‘something blue’, this is the perfect mix of both modern glamour and romance.

products.title: Waterlily Dress
products.description: The full-length Waterlily Dress is an exquisite strapless gown which catches the light with every movement, mimicking the glistening of water. Hand-sewn sequins cascade down the gown in a shimmering gradient effect from the bodice to the hem which pools in a soft train. The gown features a structured bodice with internal bustier construction, with hand-embellished waterlilies floating weightlessly

products.title: Venus Skirt
products.description: Playful, dazzling and effortlessly chic, the Venus Set is a modern muse's dream. Designed to turn heads, the pearl-embroidered Venus Top and Skirt sparkles with every move, making it the perfect blend of flirty charm and refined glamour.

products.title: Venus Top
products.description: Playful, dazzling and effortlessly chic, the Venus Set is a modern muse's dream. Designed to turn heads, the pearl-embroidered Venus Top and Skirt sparkles with every move, making it the perfect blend of flirty charm and refined glamour.

products.description: Inspired by our own Sophie's bespoke wedding look, the Sophie set is hand-embellished with delicate floral motifs in soft pastel and metallic hues to capture the magic of a garden in full bloom. products.title: Scallop Mini Dress

It's the ultimate statement for the modern romantic.

The structured bodice gently hugs the figure, offering a sleek yet romantic silhouette, whilst the column-style skirt elongates the frame with effortless grace. Finished with a scalloped hemline that m

products.title: Paloma Dress
products.description: Romantic and ethereal, the full-length Paloma Dress is an exquisite ode to timeless femininity. Designed with a sculpted corset and an effortlessly draped satin skirt, this gown blends classic couture elements with contemporary allure.

products.title: Paloma Mini Dress
products.description: Inspired by Clio's own wedding party dress, the Paloma mini strikes a beautiful balance between structure and fluidity. Its figure-hugging corset is adorned with a sparkling hand-embroidered rose, whilst the delicately draped skirt and neckline add an effortless elegance. Crafted as a corset and skirt, this look is designed to be worn as a dress, with discreet fastenings at the corset’s base allow

products.title: Hummingbird Dress
products.description: The enchanting full-length Hummingbird Dress is a breathtaking display of artistry and elegance. This intricately hand-embellished masterpiece is adorned with delicate floral embroidery, shimmering starbursts, and the graceful silhouettes of hummingbirds in flight. A captivating blend of elegance and romance, it is a true statement piece.

products.title: Flora Dress
products.description: The full-length Flora Dress is designed for the modern bride with a love for vintage elegance. Hand-crafted from sheer tulle and lace, this elegant piece is delicately adorned with carefully placed embroidery that contours the figure. The Flora Gown comes with a removable ivory slip dress. Pair with the Flora Veil to complete the look.

products.title: Evie Skirt
products.description: A vision of ethereal glamour, the Evie Skirt is a breathtaking contrast to the corset's structured form. Layers of glittering soft tulle cascade effortlessly and catch the light with every movement. The Evie set is a show-stopping ensemble designed for those who want to make an unforgettable entrance.

products.title: Evie Corset
products.description: Crafted with impeccable precision, the strapless Evie Corset's flattering deep V-shaped waist paired with the exposed boning details makes for a perfectly tailored fit. Adorned with the brand's recognisable crystal embellishments for the perfect amount of shine. Pair with the Evie Skirt for the perfect adorned ensemble.

products.title: Droplet Dress
products.description: A vision of refined elegance, the full-length Droplet Dress embodies sophistication in every detail. Meticulously hand-embellished, this floor-length masterpiece is adorned with intricate beading and cascading crystal droplets. It is an ode to timeless glamour.

products.title: Cora Crochet Mini Dress
products.description: Crafted from soft sheer tulle, the Cora Crochet mini is delicately embellished with intricate details to showcase a crochet effect. Look closely and you'll find cherubs, horses and carriages nestled into the beading, hand-drawn by Clio and hand-crafted by our artisan makers. The Crochet Cora pairs perfectly with our Beaded Crochet Bandana and Beaded Crochet Gloves.

products.title: Camelia Skirt
products.description: The Camelia Skirt in ivory taffeta is adorned with pearlescent hand-embroidery and finished with a feminine ruffled hem. This is part of a show-stopping co-ordinating bridal set, designed to make you want to dance the night away on your big day.

products.title: Camelia Corset
products.description: Clio's iconic silhouette-enhancing and timeless corsets are quickly becoming our bride's favourites. The Camelia Corset in ivory is hand-embellished with pearlescent beads and adorned with a ruffled trim. The corseted back allows for a waist-defining and versatile fit. Pair with our matching Camelia Skirt for the perfect bridal look.

products.title: Ballerina Dress Faux Leather
products.description: The Ballerina in faux leather strikes the perfect balance between structure and drama. Featuring a figure-defining corset and a voluminous faux leather muffled mini skirt, it exudes elegance with a bold twist. Delicate hand embellishments complete the look, blending femininity with a striking allure.

products.title: Ballerina Dress Taffeta
products.description: The Ballerina in taffeta strikes the perfect balance between structure and drama. Featuring a figure-defining corset and a voluminous ruffled mini skirt, it exudes femininity and playfulness with a bold twist.

products.title: Snowdrop Mini Dress
products.description: The Snowdrop Mini Dress is a fairytale brought to life. Inspired by the romanticism of the first blooms of spring, this shimmering mini dress is adorned with intricate florals, shells and doves in flight. It is the epitome of romance. A scattering of pearlescent beads and sparkling embroidery creates a luminous effect, making this dress feel like a dream.

products.title: Seashell Mini Dress
products.description: After popular request from our beach brides, the Seashell dress is adorned with corals, shells, and a starfish on a bejewelled body of sparkling pink and white. Finished with a sweetheart neckline in our iconic fit and flare shape, this dress is nothing short of enchanting.

products.title: Venus Mini Dress
products.description: Radiant and romantic, the Bridal Venus Mini Dress is designed for the bride who wants to sparkle with every step. Embellished with thousands of hand-sewn pearls and crystals, the dress features a beautiful soft sweetheart neckline and flirty split hemline. Add our Just Married Heart Bag to complete the look.

products.title: Meadow Mini Dress
products.description: Inspired by an English Country Garden, and wildflower fields in bloom, the Meadow Dress is adorned with intricate floral beadwork in soft pastel and metallic hues. Designed with a flattering square neckline and soft A-line skirt, the Meadow dress is for the true romantics. It's also the perfect excuse to add a touch of colour to your Wedding day!

products.title: Droplet Mini Dress
products.description: A dazzling re-imagination of the classic glamour embodied by the brand, the Droplet Mini exudes effortless elegance with a modern edge. Hand-embellished with shimmering beadwork and delicate crystal droplets which create a luminous effect with every moment. Pair with one of our new Heart Bags for the ultimate bridal look.

products.title: Ariel Mini Dress
products.description: Effortlessly elegant, modern yet timeless, the Ariel Mini Dress is adorned with intricate hand embroidery delicately placed to create seashell motifs. products.title: Tulip Dress
products.description: Hand beaded by our artisanal makers, the Tulip dress features a dazzling array of garden motifs on a glittering black beaded base. It is the perfect cocktail-hour mini dress for your summer soirée. Pair with our new pearlescent Petal Bag for the complete Clio Peppiatt look.

products.title: Bespoke Initial Consultation
products.description: We would love to invite you to an Initial Consultation with Clio Peppiatt. This consultation includes a detailed discussion about your bespoke design regarding colour palette, motifs, embellishment, fit and details. Once this has been purchased, our team will promptly arrange your consultation. We would love to welcome you on your bespoke journey with Clio Peppiatt.

products.title: Remove Cups
products.description: This alteration option will allow you to remove the built in cups from our signatures styles. This alteration will dispatch within 12 weeks. Due to the nature of altered items, they are not eligible to be returned.

products.title: Olympia Mini Dress
products.description: Meet the Olympia Mini Dress. Hand crafted from luxurious stretch crepe, the Olympia mini dress is fully corseted with internal boning and additional internal support for the most secure and flattering fit. Featuring a bell shape structured skirt, the Olympia Mini has voluminous hips with an added silk frill hemline that flatters and exaggerates an hour-glass silhouette. Hand embellished with fresh

products.title: Shorten Dress
products.description: This alteration option allows you to shorten an existing Clio Peppiatt dress, offering a sexy, shorter beaded mini dress for your special occasion. This covers the skilled craftsmanship required to achieve the desired length whilst maintaining the design. This alteration will dispatch within 12 weeks. Due to the nature of altered items, they are not eligible to be returned.

products.title: Lengthen Dress
products.description: This alteration option allows you to add five centimetres of length to an existing Clio Peppiatt dress, offering extra coverage for your beaded mini dress. This covers the extra materials and the skilled craftsmanship required to achieve the desired length whilst maintaining the design. This alteration will dispatch within 12 weeks. Due to the nature of altered items, they are not eligible to be r

products.title: Shorten Straps
products.description: This alteration option allows you to shorten the straps on an existing Clio Peppiatt dress. The fee covers the skilled craftsmanship required to achieve the desired aesthetic whilst maintaining the original design. Our team will confirm the alterations details with you. This alteration will dispatch within 12 weeks. Due to the nature of altered items, they are not eligible to be returned.

products.title: Close Slit
products.description: This alteration options allows you to remove the slit from our signature styles. Ensuring our signature fit and flare silhouette is still part of the dress. This alteration will dispatch within 12 weeks. Due to the nature of altered items, they are not eligible to be returned.

products.title: Into The Ocean Mini Dress
products.description: Deep dive into the shimmering aqua hues of our mesmerising Into The Ocean Dress. Hand embellished by our artisan makers, this dress is bursting with dazzling oceanic motifs and a glittering crystal neckline.

products.description: Dance the night away in Clio Peppiatt’s reimagined Night Lucina dress, featuring dazzling hand beaded celestial motifs and a glittering crystal neckline. This classic fit and flare silhouette design is inspired by our best selling Lucina Dress, this time specifically with a glamorous late night soirée in mind.
